description:
Offered: every third semester
This course surveys the dramatic Literature and theatre movement from roughly 1800 to the present. Students will read and analyze works of Ibsen, Chekhov, Shaw, Brecht and Beckett among others. The class covers such movements as Realism, Expressionism, Surrealism, Absurdist Drama and the Dada movement.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, LI
